description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword accompanied by its matching sheath. The blade is long, gently curved, and single-edged, crafted from a metallic material with a sharp point. The handle is elongated, wrapped in a red and black pattern, and features a rectangular guard separating it from the blade. The sheath is black with red accents, designed to snugly fit the blade and is positioned parallel to the sword. The overall design is sleek and functional, with a focus on both aesthetics and utility. The materials and craftsmanship suggest it is intended for ceremonial or martial use.
description: A Japanese katana sword with a curved blade, red-black wrapped handle, and matching sheath, featuring a sleek and traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the katana and sheath, highlighting the curved blade and red-black handle wrap.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing the thin profile of the blade and sheath, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the full length of the katana and sheath, with the handle and guard clearly visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the narrow profile of the sword and sheath.
attribute_handle_design: elongated, straight handle with red and black wrap, ergonomic grip
attribute_ornamentation: red and black patterned handle wrap
